calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar Dec-29-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar Dec-15-2014 Continued To Dec-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Rorem for Stacy Crivello.

Mr. Rorem stated that he has a faxed receipt for the deposit, that he was told the original is in the mail and that the funds have been deposited into Citibank in a blocked account. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account was continued to December 29, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. the Court directed Counsel to file the original receipt.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar Nov-24-2014 Continued To Dec-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Rorem for Stacy Crivello (Petitioner).

Mr. Rorem stated that he understood that the insurance proceeds are to come from New York Life, that has had to deal with the AARP office of New York Life, that he is not allowed to communicate with their legal department and that everything has to go through the claims office. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account was continued to December 15, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PETITION Petition For Order Directing Deposit Of Funds
Off Calendar Oct-22-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Rorem for Stacy Crivello.

Mr. Rorem stated that he does not represent the insurance company, explained that there are two insurance companies, that New York Life is paying the life insurance benefit for which the funds are to be deposited into a blocked account, that Ms. Crivello pays a monthly premium to ARAG for legal services, that he gets paid by that insurance (ARAG), and that he represents Ms. Crivello. The Petition for Order Directing Depoist of Funds was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
